canonicalization: RFC 8785 (JCS), nulls preserved (matches src.signing.canonicalize_jcs_strict; same byte output as trailofbits/rfc8785.py and @nobulex/crypto canonicalize)
signature_scheme: Ed25519 over canonicalizeJCS(link minus signature), no sha256 wrap (per aeoess format note 1 on A2A #1786, 2026-05-13)
field_name_convention: CTEF v0.3.2 §A: camelCase validityWindow with snake_case not_before/not_after; chain-level max_depth

fixture_intent.01-scope-expansion: Triggers INVALID_CLAIM_SCOPE after passing depth + validity + signature
fixture_intent.02-depth-violation: Triggers DELEGATION_DEPTH_EXCEEDED — first check in order
fixture_intent.03-signature-substitution: Triggers INVALID_SIGNATURE after passing depth + validity
